track_scores.rationale: FC improved +0.3 (night scene clarity dramatically improved with night pipeline). PP improved +0.3 (better exposure/contrast in night scene). CP improved +0.4 (scene 4 now scores 93-99 across all cameras, professional-grade night rendering).

scene_4_parking_night.source: v17_final (night pipeline v17 from v15 base)
scene_4_parking_night.note: Night pipeline with CLAHE 0.3 + EDGE_ENHANCE + gamma exposure. DriverPOV hit 99 (highest ever).

critical_findings.details: First time exceeding 85.0 threshold. Hybrid approach (v16 day + v17 night) achieved 87.2, exceeding target by 2.2 points. Scene 4 night optimization was the key breakthrough — scoring 97.0 average (up from 87.3 in v16).

v17 night pipeline on v15 base renders: BirdEye 98, DriverPOV 99, SecurityCam 93, WideAngle 98. Average 97.0 vs v16's 84.0 (scene 4 only) and v16's overall 87.3 for scene 4. The CLAHE 0.3 + EDGE_ENHANCE + gamma exposure combination works extremely well for night scenes.

v17 CLAHE blend=0.15 on day BirdEye scored 67-73 (vs v16's 78-80). Moderate CLAHE introduces contrast artifacts in bright overhead day shots. Lesson: CLAHE is night-only. Day BirdEye should use v16 v1 pipeline (autocontrast + gamma + USM only).

critical_findings.finding: HYBRID APPROACH IS THE OPTIMAL STRATEGY
critical_findings.details: Different scenes need different post-processing pipelines. Day scenes: v1 conservative pipeline. Night scenes: v2 aggressive CLAHE + edge enhance pipeline. A one-size-fits-all approach loses 5-9 points on the wrong scene type.

next_priorities.impact: Could push day scenes from 83 avg toward 90+
next_priorities.approach: Re-render scenes 1-3 with warm HDRI, golden hour lighting, then apply night pipeline
PIL text overlays: scale bars, exhibit markers, disclaimers, timestamps

next_priorities.task: Impact deformation geometry for scenes 1 and 3
next_priorities.approach: Blender mesh deformation at collision impact points
Per-scene camera tuning, additional camera angles, forensic detail

color_management: AgX (Medium High Contrast) + v17 hybrid post-processing

day_scenes_1_3.pipeline: v16 v1 (autocontrast 1.5% cutoff, USM radius=2 pct=180 thresh=3, gamma exposure 0.45, contrast 1.15)

night_scene_4.pipeline: v17 night (autocontrast 1.0%, gamma 0.45, CLAHE blend=0.3 grid=8, USM radius=2 pct=300 thresh=2, EDGE_ENHANCE, contrast 1.18, gamma 0.45)
